items.title: Memphis Grizzlies take Richie Saunders at pick 32. That was originally the Pacers 2nd round pick. They sent it to the Bucks in a string of deals to move up and get Isaiah Jackson in 2021, then the Bucks sent it to Memphis in a part of their trade for Grayson Allen.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Memphis Grizzlies take Richie Saunders at pick 32. That was originally the Pacers 2nd round pick. They sent it to the Bucks in a string of deals to move up and get Isaiah Jackson in 2021, then the Bucks sent it to Memphis in a part of their trade for Grayson Allen.
